outOfMaharashtra.heading: Out of Maharashtra — Special Category
outOfMaharashtra.applicableTo: Half Marathon only No Age Category
outOfMaharashtra.description: A dedicated category for Half Marathon runners travelling from outside Maharashtra. Male and female participants compete separately with no internal age division.
outOfMaharashtra.note: Separate cash prizes are awarded exclusively for this category.
